primary_sources.title: Auditor General's Report on Foreign Workers Centralised Management System (FWCMS) operated by Bestinet
Interpol Red Notice issuance request against Bestinet leadership (referenced in T4A reporting and parliamentary questions)
Coverage of the visa-system contract extension cycle: Malaysiakini, The Edge, FMT, 2018-2026

notes: Bestinet operated Malaysia's foreign-worker visa system worth approximately RM400 million without a formal contract for an extended period. Then-Home Minister Zahid Hamidi created a 10-agency restriction concentrating the work; subsequent administrations including Anwar's Unity Government extended the contract despite warnings. Interpol arrest request issued against Bestinet leadership. T4A issue 1973 documents the structural finding. The from_actor field uses the institutional placeholder for the federal government's procurement arm; refinement to a more specific actor (Home Ministry) requires the institution record to be encoded.
